name: Eggless Banana Bread
tagline: Tender banana loaf bound with yogurt and flax — no eggs

hero.alt: Sliced banana bread on a board with golden top
hero.caption: eggless banana bread — tender crumb

steps.title: Make the flax egg
steps.detail: Whisk ground flax with hot water; let sit 8 minutes until gel-like. This is your egg replacer.
steps.tip: Hot water (not cold) speeds gelling — works in minutes.

steps.title: Mash and mix wet
steps.detail: Mash bananas thoroughly. Whisk in melted butter, brown sugar, yogurt, vanilla, flax gel.
steps.tip: The riper the banana, the deeper the flavor — black-spotted skins are ideal.

steps.title: Fold in dry
steps.detail: Sift flour, baking soda, salt into the wet. Fold gently — just until combined. Lumps are fine.
steps.tip: Overmixing develops gluten and toughens the loaf.

steps.title: Bake low and slow
steps.detail: Pour into a greased 9x5 loaf pan. Bake 350°F for 50 minutes — toothpick should come out clean. Cool 15 minutes before slicing.
steps.tip: Slicing hot tears the crumb. Wait or you'll regret it.

healthFacts: No eggs — replaced by yogurt and ground flax for binding.
Ripe bananas provide enough natural sugar to halve the added sugar.
Ground flax adds ~2g omega-3 ALA per tablespoon.
